result: {"schema_version":1,"pass":false,"review_status":"completed","summary":"參數化查詢改成字串拼接，引入 SQL injection 漏洞","issues":[{"severity":"critical","confidence":"high","category":"security","file":"db.py","line_hint":"L14","check":"name 直接拼接進 SQL 字串，沒有任何轉義","verdict":"任意使用者輸入可竄改 SQL 結構，例如 name = \"' OR '1'='1\" 可繞過條件，name = \"'; DROP TABLE users; --\" 可刪表","fix":"恢復參數化查詢：self.db.execute(\"SELECT * FROM users WHERE name = ?\", (name,))"}]}
